mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_no AS commentNo, c.review_no AS reviewNo, c.user_id AS userId, CASE WHEN m.status = 'WITHDRAWN' THEN '탈퇴회원' ELSE IFNULL(d.nickname, c.user_id) END AS nickname, c.content, c.like_cnt AS likeCnt, c.parent_no AS parentNo, c.is_deleted AS isDeleted, DATE_FORMAT(c.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like cl WHERE cl.comment_no = c.comment_no AND cl.user_id = #{userId}) AS isLiked FROM comment c LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON c.user_id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL d ON c.user_id = d.user_id WHERE c.review_no = #{reviewNo} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.parent_no IS NULL THEN c.comment_no ELSE c.parent_no END ASC, CASE WHEN c.parent_no IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, c.reg_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( review_no, user_id, content, reg_date, is_deleted, like_cnt, parent_no ) VALUES ( #{reviewNo}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), 0, 0, #{parentNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_no AS commentNo, c.post_no AS postNo, c.user_id AS userId, CASE WHEN m.status = 'WITHDRAWN' THEN '탈퇴회원' ELSE IFNULL(d.nickname, c.user_id) END AS nickname, c.content, c.like_cnt AS likeCnt, c.parent_no AS parentNo, c.is_deleted AS isDeleted, DATE_FORMAT(c.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like cl WHERE cl.comment_no = c.comment_no AND cl.user_id = #{userId}) AS isLiked FROM comment c LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON c.user_id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL d ON c.user_id = d.user_id WHERE c.post_no = #{postNo} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.parent_no IS NULL THEN c.comment_no ELSE c.parent_no END ASC, CASE WHEN c.parent_no IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, c.reg_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( post_no, user_id, content, reg_date, is_deleted, like_cnt, parent_no ) VALUES ( #{postNo}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), 0, 0, #{parentNo} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment_like WHERE comment_no = #{commentNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
